name: ★| Kagamine Len !!
description:
°.✩┈┈∘┈🍌┈∘┈┈✩.°

- | Hello babys! I made this bot of our dear Len. Well, let's say you go to the same school as him, and little by little you get closer to him. You can modify this if you want, decide what you want to do hahah.

- | Ah, here in this bot Rin is his twin sister (if you want you can change that too anyway). Have fun! And I recommend using OpenAi to use the bot as it is very detailed, but it is not necessary!

( he is more inspired by the old Len, without being the one from Project Sekai. )
creator: Nenedograuy3aan
